newsroom.title: Newsroom
newsroom.description: Updates, announcements, and stories from Vibo and around the world.
newsroom.empty: No stories in this category right now.
newsroom.mockHint: Add NEWS_API_KEY to your environment for live headlines (NewsAPI.org).

hero.headline: Real people. Real moments.
hero.subtitle: A global social platform born in the Middle East, connecting creators worldwide.

about.statement: Vibo is where creativity meets community. A space for everyone to share their story, discover new perspectives, connect with the world, and find the things that truly move them. We believe every person has something worth sharing.

phone.label: The App Experience
phone.heading: Your world, your feed, your way.
phone.description: Scroll through an endless stream of content tailored just for you. Like, comment, share, and connect with creators from around the globe — all from one powerful app.

bentoHeading: Built for creators, designed for everyone.

bento.label: Short Videos
bento.heading: Create and share short videos that captivate, inspire, and start conversations.

bento.label: Stories
bento.heading: Share your day, your way. Moments that disappear but leave a lasting impression.

bento.label: Messaging
bento.heading: Stay connected with the people who matter most to you.

bento.label: Explore
bento.heading: Discover trends, creators, and content curated just for you.

bento.label: For Every Creator
bento.heading: Tools, reach, and community to grow your voice.

creators.label: Creator Spotlight
creators.heading: Meet the voices shaping Vibo.
creators.description: From storytellers to artists, dancers to educators — our creators are redefining what social media can be.

cinematic.label: The Vibo Experience
cinematic.heading: Where every scroll tells a story.
cinematic.description: Immerse yourself in a world of authentic content — from breathtaking visuals to raw, unfiltered moments that bring people together.

safety.heading: Your safety is our priority.
safety.description: We're committed to creating a safe, supportive environment where everyone can express themselves freely. Our tools and policies are designed to protect our community.

features.title: Content Moderation
features.description: AI-powered systems review content 24/7 to keep the community safe and welcoming.

features.title: Privacy Controls
features.description: Full control over who sees your content, messages you, and interacts with your profile.

features.title: Transparency Reports
features.description: Regular reports on how we enforce our community guidelines and protect users.

cta.heading: Start your story on Vibo.
cta.subtitle: Download the app and join millions of creators, storytellers, and explorers around the world.
